label: Multi-agent coordination, debate & markets

node.label: Multi-agent coordination, debate & markets
node.definition: Multi-agent coordination allocates roles, information, incentives, messages, and shared resources among multiple decision-making entities.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Multi-agent coordination, debate & markets is modeled as depending on Observe–plan–act agent loops, Game theory & decision theory and feeding downstream nodes such as Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence, Game-playing, control & simulation agents, Graph-of-Thought & non-linear deliberation.
